gt_sql: SELECT t2.name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.league_id = t2.id WHERE t1.season = '2015/2016' AND t1.home_team_goal = t1.away_team_goal GROUP BY t2.name ORDER BY COUNT(t1.id) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT l.name
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016' 
  AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1
question: Give the name of the league had the most matches end as draw in the 2016 season?
